sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29584" key="dusfh/mhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσφήμ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n29584.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">word of ill omen</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1065e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
